briefdescription.para: Contains a minimal set of functions for the XVphy driver that allow access to all of the Video PHY core's functionality.

detaileddescription.para: See xvphy.h for a detailed description of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 als 10/19/15 Initial release. 1.2 gm 08/26/16 Suppressed warning messages due to unused arguments 1.4 gm 29/11/16 Added preprocessor directives for sw footprint reduction Changed TX reconfig hook from TxPllRefClkDiv1Reconfig to TxChReconfig Corrected the default return value of DRP encoding APIs to prevent overwriting the reserved bits 1.6 gm 12/06/17 Changed XVphy_DrpRead with XVphy_DrpRd Changed XVphy_DrpWrite with XVphy_DrpWr Improved status return of APIs with DRP Rd and Wr
